groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #7.

sentences.text: Active protection systems intercept incoming projectiles milliseconds before they reach the tank hull.
Active protection systems intercept incoming projectiles milliseconds before they reach the tank hull. Camouflage paint in a desert pattern covered every surface of the tank to reduce its visibility.

Active protection systems intercept incoming projectiles milliseconds before they reach the tank hull. Camouflage paint in a desert pattern covered every surface of the tank to reduce its visibility. Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges.
